acceptance_criteria.text: Network parent content-plan readiness treats maps + SEO present, services missing as a usable search-plan foundation instead of a generic incomplete-data warning.
proof: ContentPlanTab derives networkHasSearchPlanFoundation for network scopes with map links and SEO where only services are missing.
The readiness banner switches to emerald copy: Сеть готова для поискового контент-плана.

acceptance_criteria.text: Copy distinguishes network menu/products/services from single-business services and gives the user a clear next action.
proof: Network copy uses Нет меню, товаров или услуг and CTA Добавить меню/услуги.

acceptance_criteria.text: Frontend build and content-plan tests pass.
proof: cd frontend && npm run build completed successfully.

acceptance_criteria.text: Frontend-only production rollout is verified against live assets.
proof: Live NewsGenerator-DffR2VUO.js contains the new network readiness copy.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: source venv/bin/activate && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_content_plan_generation.py tests/test_content_plan_policy.py
known_gaps: Production services for Lukoil are still not populated; this task only improves readiness UX around that gap.
